ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* The time zone of the region */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the local shipping office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_standards" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping standard */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for standard shipping */,
  "tracking_available" TEXT /* Whether tracking is available for standard shipping */,
  "cost" REAL /* The cost of standard shipping */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the cost is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the shipping standard was last updated */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* The name of the service provider for standard shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_standards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expedited_shipping" (
  "expedited_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expedited shipping option */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for expedited shipping */,
  "tracking_available" TEXT /* Whether tracking is available for expedited shipping */,
  "cost" REAL /* The cost of expedited shipping */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the cost is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the expedited shipping option was last updated */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* The name of the service provider for expedited shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expedited_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expedited_shipping_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping rule */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping rule or restriction */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date from which the rule is effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The date when the rule expires */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rules_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* The price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping standard */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* The date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* The total cost of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the total cost is denominated */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* The address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* The billing address for the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* The tax amount for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* The discount amount for the order */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_id") REFERENCES shipping_standards ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* The carrier used for the shipment */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* The current location of the shipment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the shipment information was last updated */,
  "signature_required" TEXT /* Whether a signature is required for delivery */,
  "insurance_value" REAL /* The insurance value of the shipment */,
  "insurance_currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the insurance value is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the customer information was last updated */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the customer's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* The loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., shipping performance, cost analysis) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* The user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "cost" REAL /* The cost of the shipping method */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the cost is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the shipping method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
